name: Herb Stuffing[for a 12-pound Turkey]
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion in butter or margarine until soft in a medium-sized frying pan; stir in celery, chicken broth, poultry seasoning, salt, pepper, and water. Heat to boiling.
2. Pour over bread and parsley in a large bowl; toss lightly until evenly moist.
Makes approximately 10 Cups or enough to stuff a 12-pound bird.
